name: The Solar Sail Winch
description: Unfurl the solar sail by over-cranking the winch motor to snap the tension cable.

flaws.name: Spoof High Tension Reading
flaws.flavor_text: Inject a 'high' tension packet into the sensor. Due to inverted logic, the motor controller reads this as 'low' tension.

flaws.name: Overcrank Winch Motor
flaws.flavor_text: Tell the winch to self-regulate. Tricked by the 'low' reading, it cranks to maximum force, snapping the cable and physically releasing the sail.
